metadata.description: Model-routing patterns for Claude Code: architect-as-orchestrator with Grok 4.5 and GPT-5.6 Sol implementation lanes (plus an in-house Claude fallback lane) and a Fable 5 commitment-boundary advisor.

plugins.name: fable-advisor
plugins.description: Architect-as-orchestrator: your session runs Claude's most capable model, routing implementation to Grok 4.5 (Grok CLI) and GPT-5.6 Sol at high reasoning (Codex) — with an in-house Claude fallback lane when neither CLI is installed, and a commitment-boundary advisor.
